offer_positioning: Premium athletic brand access for qualified retail partners — exclusive seasonal drops, co-marketing budget, and sell-through support.
differentiators: Access to exclusive seasonal drops not available to general market
Co-marketing budget and in-store visual merchandising support
Dedicated partner success manager and quarterly business reviews
constraints: Do not reference competitor athletic brands by name
Do not promise specific inventory allocations without approval
cta_offer_lock: Worth a quick call to walk through the Q3 partner program details?
other_products:
Nike Direct Digital Partner Program
Nike by You Custom
company_notes: Nike's wholesale program gives qualified retail partners exclusive access to performance footwear and apparel collections, with co-marketing support and dedicated partner success resources.
